# REGAL | Voice AI Agent Platform


Regal helps businesses build, improve, and manage voice AI Agents.


## Product Overview


- [Product Overview](https://www.regal.ai/product): Explore all Regal products designed to build, monitor, and scale AI Agents.


## Integrations


- [Integrations](https://www.regal.ai/integrations/all): Connect your applications seamlessly with Regal to leverage AI Agents.


## Enterprise Solutions


- [Enterprise](https://www.regal.ai/enterprise): Tailored solutions built for complex enterprises to manage voice AI at scale.


## AI Agents


- [Phone AI Agents](https://www.regal.ai/ai-agents): Voice AI agents designed for phone interactions, enhancing customer engagement.
- [SMS AI Agents](https://www.regal.ai/sms-ai-agents): AI agents that handle SMS communications, providing quick responses and support.
- [Chat AI Agents](https://www.regal.ai/chat-ai-agents): Chat-based AI agents that facilitate online customer interactions.
- [WebRTC Voice AI Agents](https://www.regal.ai/webrtc-voice-agents): Enable voice calls on your website with one click, no phone call required.


## Regal Platform


- [AI Agent Builder](https://www.regal.ai/ai-voice-agent-builder): Regal's Enterprise AI Voice Agent Builder lets CX teams design, test, and deploy high-performing voice workflows that reduce costs and scale faster.
- [Unified Customer Profile](https://www.regal.ai/unified-customer-profile): A comprehensive view of customer interactions to personalize engagement.
- [Journey Builder](https://www.regal.ai/journey-builder): Tool for mapping customer journeys and optimizing interactions.
- [IVR](https://www.regal.ai/ivr): Interactive Voice Response systems to streamline customer service.
- [A/B Testing](https://www.regal.ai/ab-testing-cx): Test different approaches to improve customer interactions and outcomes.
- [Conversation Intelligence](https://www.regal.ai/conversation-intelligence): Analyze conversations to gain insights and improve service quality.
- [Sales Dialer](https://www.regal.ai/sales-dialer): Automated dialing solutions to enhance sales outreach.
- [Analytics & Reporting](https://www.regal.ai/analytics-reporting): Tools for tracking performance and generating reports on AI agent effectiveness.
- [Branded Caller ID](https://www.regal.ai/branded-caller-id): Custom caller ID solutions to enhance brand recognition during calls.
- [Spam Remediation](https://www.regal.ai/spam-remediation): Solutions to identify and mitigate spam calls.
- [Unified Agent Desktop](https://www.regal.ai/unified-agent-desktop): Human and AI agents working together. A single inbox for phone, SMS, and email.
- [Regal Copilot](https://www.regal.ai/regal-copilot): Generate an agent through a chat interface with your business logic and brand automatically built in.


## Use Cases


- [Customer Support](https://www.regal.ai/use-case/automate-customer-support): Transform customer support with Voice AI Agents that understand intent and take action.
- [Lead Qualification](https://www.regal.ai/use-case/automated-lead-qualification): Efficiently route, score, and qualify leads with Voice AI Agents.
- [Appointment Setting](https://www.regal.ai/use-case/ai-appointment-setter): Manage high-volume calls with Voice AI Agents and reduce no-shows without increasing staff.
- [Collections](https://www.regal.ai/use-case/automated-collections-services): Automate repetitive tasks with Voice AI Agents to improve recovery rates.
- [Bookings](https://www.regal.ai/use-case/ai-bookings-agent): Streamline scheduling operations with Voice AI Agents to enhance customer experience.


## Industry Solutions


- [Healthcare](https://www.regal.ai/homepage/ai-agents-for-healthcare): Voice AI agents tailored for the healthcare sector.
- [Insurance](https://www.regal.ai/homepage/ai-agents-for-insurance): Voice AI agents designed for the insurance industry.
- [Local Services](https://www.regal.ai/homepage/ai-agents-for-home-services): Voice AI Agent solutions for local service providers to enhance customer interactions.
- [Education](https://www.regal.ai/homepage/ai-agents-for-education): Voice AI agents for educational institutions.
- [eCommerce](https://www.regal.ai/homepage/ai-agents-for-ecommerce): Enhance online shopping experiences with voice AI agents.
- [Medicare](https://www.regal.ai/ai-agents-for-medicare): AI Agents specifically for Medicare-related use cases.
- [Loan Collection & Servicing](https://www.regal.ai/ai-agents-for-loan-servicing-collections): AI-driven solutions for managing loan collections.
- [Financial Services](https://www.regal.ai/financial-services): Voice AI Agents for financial institutions.
- [Legal Services](https://www.regal.ai/legal-services): Voice AI Agents designed for the legal sector.
- [BPO](https://www.regal.ai/homepage/ai-agents-for-bpo): Business Process Outsourcing solutions enhanced by voice AI agents.


## Resources and Support


- [Knowledge Hub](https://support.regal.ai/hc/en-us): A resource center for quick answers to common questions.
- [Documentation](https://developer.regal.ai/docs/what-is-regal): Learn how to build, test, deploy, monitor, and integrate Regal voice ai agents.
- [What's New](https://www.regal.io/category/whats-new): Stay updated on the latest product feature releases.
- [Customer Success Stories](https://www.regal.ai/customers): Read how enterprise customers have seen success with Regal's AI Agents.
- [Regal University](https://www.regal.ai/regaluniversity): Educational resources to maximize the use of Regal products.
- [Product Tours](https://www.regal.ai/product-tour): Clickable demo and product tour of Regal's AI Voice Agent Builder.
- [Resources](https://www.regal.ai/resources): A collection of various topics and content types related to voice AI.
- [Blog](https://www.regal.ai/blog): Insights and articles on voice AI and related topics.
- [State of Voice AI Agents](https://www.regal.ai/state-of-voice-ai-agents): In this report, we analyzed millions of Voice AI agent conversations across healthcare, financial services, insurance, and other verticals to identify the trends shaping 2026.
- [Contact Center Podcast](https://www.regal.ai/podcast/outbound-contact-center-podcast): Insights from contact center leaders on industry trends.
- [15 Minute Founder Podcast](https://www.regal.ai/podcast/15-minute-founder-podcast): Lessons from startup founders on growth and innovation.


## Tools and Calculators


- [AI Agent ROI Calculator](https://www.regal.ai/ai-agent-roi-calculator): Calculate your savings with AI Agents.
- [AI Agent Glossary](https://www.regal.ai/glossaries/ai-agent-glossary): Definitions and FAQs related to AI agents.
- [AI Voice Agent Demo](https://www.regal.ai/ai-phone-agent/pick-a-customer-persona-scenario): Get a call from a Regal AI Voice agent tailored to your preferred industry and use case.
- [CX Readiness Assessment](https://www.regal.ai/cx-readiness-score): Find out how prepared your company is to deliver fast, accessible, and scalable customer experiences—and see how AI agents can help.
